sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n30332" key="e)/gknisma" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἔγκνισμα</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ατος</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">τό</gen>, <sense id="n30332.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">a piece of meat</tr_>, Argive word in <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Plu.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.296f</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
